Tip of the day
Being overencumbered only slows down your activities, but doesn't affect travel.

Erdwise dumpster diving

Erdwise dumpster diving
Main Skill: Foraging
Max Efficiency: 200%

Amidst the labyrinthine alleyways of the city, you explore the forgotten corners, sifting through discarded odds and ends in hopes of unearthing hidden treasures among the cast-offs.

The Erdwise dumpster diving activity is a Foraging activity.

Location

This activity can be done at the following location:

  • Blackspell Port in Grand Duchy of Trellin-Erdwise

Visibility

This activity is always visible.

Requirements

Skill Level Requirements:

  • At least Foraging lvl. 35.
  • At least Agility lvl. 20.

Experience Information

Skills Base
XP 		Base
Steps 		Base
XP/Step 		Total Base
XP/Step 		Minimum
Steps 		Max
XP/Step 		Total Max
XP/Step
Foraging 173 250 0.692 0.940 125 1.384 1.880
Agility 62 0.248 0.496

Rate 		W.E.A.R. Value

Each of the secondary drops is rolled independently of the others.

Guides

No guides exists yet. You can help make one.

Gear Sets

No gear sets exist yet. You can help make one.

Trivia

  • Previously one activity "Dumpster Diving". It was split into two along with Trellin dumpster diving.


This page is updated automatically to reflect information in the current game version.
